documentation.description:
Describe a trajectory using an array of up-to 5 waypoints in the local
frame (MAV_FRAME_LOCAL_NED).

record_types.name: Trajectory_Representation_Waypoints

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Valid_Points
fields.description: Number of valid points (up-to 5 waypoints are possible)

fields.name: Pos_X
fields.description:
Units: [m]
X-coordinate of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Pos_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Y-coordinate of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Pos_Z
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Z-coordinate of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Vel_X
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
X-velocity of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Vel_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Y-velocity of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Vel_Z
fields.description:
Units: [m/s]
Z-velocity of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Acc_X
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
X-acceleration of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Acc_Y
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Y-acceleration of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Acc_Z
fields.description:
Units: [m/s/s]
Z-acceleration of waypoint, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Pos_Yaw
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Yaw angle, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Vel_Yaw
fields.description:
Units: [rad/s]
Yaw rate, set to NaN if not being used

fields.name: Command
fields.description: MAV_CMD command id of waypoint, set to UINT16_MAX if not being used.

True if x25crc is valid for the message.

Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
